objectives.text: Pass judgment at the restraint chair.

stages.description: The smaller chapel keeps twelve candle places for eleven calcified dead. The mortuary has its own count.

stages.task: Find Sapphira Rufa and decide what remains
stages.description: Keziah Fullo kept twelve names. The road office buried Sapphira beneath the mortuary after he turned toward Hallowfen's bells.

stages.task: Pass judgment at the restraint chair
stages.description: Sapphira is dead. Return to the examiner's chair and decide what the road will remember.
You chose what the road will remember about the twelve.
